display.purpose: Used for luxury page hero titles.

body.purpose: Used for paragraphs, listings, and text details.

components.name: Crimson Primary Button
components.description: Standard action button with rich Crimson fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #8B0000; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #700000; transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Listing Card
components.description: Property display card with specs details.
components.html:
For Sale

Modern Luxury Villa

4 Beds4 Baths
₹ 5.25 Cr
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: all 200ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-badge { background: #8B0000; color: #fff; padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 11px; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; color: #0F172A; margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 18px; } .ds-meta { font-size: 13px; color: #64748B; margin-bottom: 12px; display: flex; gap: 12px; } .ds-price { color: #8B0000; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; }

narrative.overview: RealtyNow adopts a highly curated, premium look inspired by modern editorial luxury real estate. The design focuses on rich crimson accents against dark navy slate backdrops and clean white listing layouts. We explicitly reject flat gray or green SaaS elements, neon styles, and cluttered grids.
keyCharacteristics: Dramatic, high-contrast dark sections alternating with clean white listing areas.
Refined Roman serif typography (Playfair Display) for structural elegance.
Minimalist, highly visible trust badges and tags (verified stamps).
Compliant Crimson (#8B0000) accents for focus, action, and direction.

rules.name: The Crimson Action Rule
rules.body: Crimson (#8B0000) is reserved strictly for buttons, active link indicators, active tabs, and primary action links. Never use Crimson for general paragraph text.

rules.name: The Serif Ground Rule
rules.body: All displays and section headers (H1, H2, H3) use Playfair Display to reinforce the premium, architectural aesthetic across every page.

rules.name: The Lifted Hover Rule
rules.body: Surfaces at rest are flat or have a subtle shadow. On hover, apply a translateY(-2px) transition alongside a soft shadow to signify interaction.

dos: Do maintain a strict contrast ratio of 4.5:1 or higher for all copy.
Do use icons consistently (e.g. Heroicons or Lucide SVG icons).
Do include a pointer cursor on all click targets.
donts: Don't use neon, gradient, or rounded-pill button structures.
Don't hide critical property information; list beds, baths, and area specs cleanly.
Don't use emojis as interface icons.
